name: Crescent Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1 Egg yolk, plus water to measure 3/4 cup
1 teaspoon Active Dry Yeast (or Butter/Margarine - melted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients, except the melted butter, in the inner pot of a bread machine in the order listed. Let stand for 5 minutes.
2. Select the DOUGH setting and press START.
3. The dough will be completed in 1 hour and 15 minutes.
4. Remove the dough from the inner pot and place it in a greased bowl, turning to coat evenly. Cover and let rest in a warm, draft-free place for 20-30 minutes.
5. Punch down the dough.
6. On a floured surface, roll the dough into a 10-inch round. Brush with melted butter.
7. Cut into 10 wedges. Roll up each wedge, starting at the wide end. Press points to seal.
8. Place the rolls, point-side down, on a greased baking sheet and shape them into crescents. Brush with remaining butter.
9. Cover and let rise in a warm, draft-free place for 20-30 minutes.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 8-10 minutes, or until golden brown.
